app_title: 八字自動チャートシステム
what_is_bazi_p1: 八字（四柱）は、出生日時の年・月・日・時の干支に基づき、節気と真太陽時を組み合わせて推命します。
what_is_bazi_p2: 当システムは、海外ユーザーの出生時間を中国時間帯に変換し、それを旧暦に変換した後、現地の首都の太陽時と組み合わせて正確な八字を作成します。
birth_city_placeholder: 都市名を入力（任意、首都の太陽時をデフォルト使用）
intro: 出生国・日付・時間を入力してください。出生地の真太陽時に基づいて八字を算出します。
unknown_birth_time: 出生時間不明（時柱を除外）
liunian_note: 以下の分析は命盤構造に基づく年間の傾向を示します。
dayun_note: 各大運は10年間の長期的な傾向を示します。
explain_title: システム説明と免責事項
verify_p1: 本システムは出生地の経度に基づく真太陽時で排盤し、時柱と節気の切替の正確性を重視します。
verify_p2: 出生時間が不明な場合、時柱は計算から除外されます。
verify_p3: 節気の切替は具体的な時刻で計算されます。
disclaimer_p1: 本システムは伝統的な東洋占術に基づきます。
disclaimer_p2: 結果は参考であり、決定的なものではありません。
disclaimer_p3: 医療・法律・投資などの重要な意思決定には使用しないでください。
login_hint: ログインすると排盤履歴を保存できます。
wuxing_explain_p1: 五行（木・火・土・金・水）は、干支の性質と相互関係を表します。強弱の配置により、傾向や適した環境が形作られます。
wuxing_explain_p2: 生：木→火→土→金→水→木／克：木→土、土→水、水→火、火→金、金→木。分析ではこれらを組み合わせて、仕事・財運・人間関係・健康のリズムを示します。
yongshen_explain_p1: 用神は命局のバランスを取るための優先要素です。単一要素を増やすことではなく、動的な均衡が重要です。
yongshen_explain_p2: 命局が強い場合は泄・通関、弱い場合は生助が傾向として選ばれます。仕事・協力・生活の選択に落とし込みます。
dayun_explain_title: 大運（10年サイクル）の説明
dayun_explain_p1: 大運は「起運」から始まる10年間の段階です。真太陽時と最近の節気を用いて起運を算出し、順行/逆行を決めます。
dayun_explain_p2: 各大運には干支テーマがあり、能力の集中・圧力の挑戦・蓄積や調整などエネルギーの転換を意味します。流年と合わせて年間の焦点を示します。
dayun_explain_p3: 説明は生活で観察可能なサイン（役割変更、関係構造の再編、転居、責任の強化等）に結び付け、断定的表現は避けます。

shensha_tianyi_summary: 命中最大の貴人星。凶を吉に変える守護星。
shensha_tianyi_detail: 天乙貴人は八字で最も重要な貴人星です。困難な時に助けを見つけ、吉に転じます。
shensha_tianyi_career: 人脈や社交が必要な職業に適しています。営業、PR、経営、コンサルティングなど。
shensha_tianyi_health: 貴人星が守るため、一般的に健康は良いですが、他人に頼りすぎないよう注意してください。
shensha_tianyi_relationship: 異性縁が良く、条件の良い出会いがあります。結婚生活中も貴人によって矛盾が解消されます。
shensha_tianyi_advice: ポジティブな友人を沢山作り、身近な貴人を大切にしましょう。同時に自分も他人の貴人になりましょう。
shensha_yima_summary: 移動、変化、移住、出行を表す星。
shensha_yima_detail: 移動や変化を表す星。仕事の異動や出張、引っ越しなどが起きます。
shensha_yima_career: 出張が多い仕事、流動性の高い仕事に適しています。貿易、運輸、観光、ジャーナリスト、営業、外交など。
shensha_yima_health: 移動が多い場合は身体の保养に注意し、特に旅中の安全と食事の衛生に気を配りましょう。

onboard_title: 八字チャートへようこそ
onboard_step1_desc: 八字（四柱）は、出生日の年・月・日・時の干支に基づき、節気と真太陽時を組み合わせて推命する伝統的な運命分析システムです。天文学的アルゴリズムで節気の切り替わりを正確に計算します。
onboard_step2_desc: 必須：出生国、出生日、性別。任意：出生都市（精度向上）、出生時間（未入力時は時柱を計算しません）。システムが自動的に真太陽時に変換します。
onboard_step3_desc: チャート完成后、四柱八字、五行分布、神殺、性格分析、大運、年運などの詳細を確認できます。AIによる深度解読も利用可能です。
onboard_step4_title: セキュリティとプライバシー
onboard_step4_desc: お客様のデータは厳重に保護されています：全通信が暗号化され、パスワードは不可逆的にハッシュ化され、SQLインジェクション、XSS攻撃、ブルートフォース攻撃を自動防御します。ログインは30日間保持されます。
onboard_step5_desc: ログイン後、履歴から任意のチャートを「私の八字」に設定できます。ホーム画面に常に表示され、いつでも確認できます。
onboard_step6_desc: 結果ページに著者のWeChatとLINEのQRコードがあります。ワンオンワンの八字相談をご希望の方は、友達追加してください（有料サービス）。
onboard_skip: チュートリアルをスキップ
footer_consult_title: もっと知りたいですか？
footer_consult_desc: パーソナルな八字相談については、著者のWeChatまたはLINEを追加してください（有料サービス）
footer_consult_link: またはこちらをクリックして詳しく見る
footer_powered_by: Powered by BaZi Auto Chart System
consult_card_title: 正確だと思いましたか？もっと知りたいですか？
consult_card_desc: 分析が実際と合っていて、もっと深く詳細な個別相談を希望される場合は、著者の友達を追加してワンオンワンの有料分析を受けられます。
consult_page_subtitle: ワンオンワンの八字分析と人生ガイダンス
consult_page_intro_desc: 無料チャートは基本的な命理フレームワークを提供しますが、ワンオンワン相談ではお客様の状況に合わせたより正確で詳細な分析が可能です。
consult_feature1_desc: お客様の具体的な質問に基づき、命盤の重要な情報を分析
consult_feature2_desc: 仕事、財運、恋愛、健康の全方面的なアドバイス
consult_feature3_desc: 重要な時期を正確に予測し、人生のチャンスを逃さない

shishen_bijian_relationship: Fairly independent in relationships; not overly dependent on partner. In marriage, give your partner space and avoid being too self-centered.
shishen_bijian_health: Generally good physical constitution, but avoid overexertion.
shishen_bijian_advice: Learn to cooperate and share; don't carry everything alone. Appropriately leverage others' help.
shishen_jiecai_career: Suitable for sales, public relations, entertainment, catering, and other industries requiring social skills and adventurous spirit.
shishen_jiecai_wealth: Rob Wealth brings spending and waste. Spends lavishly and is easily cheated financially. Strengthen financial awareness.
shishen_jiecai_relationship: Proactive in relationships but may neglect partner for friends. Balance social life and family.
shishen_jiecai_health: Rob Wealth brings consumption; avoid overtaxing your body.

shishen_shishen_career: Suitable for catering, food, performing arts, creative work, education, and other fields requiring talent and expressiveness.
shishen_shishen_wealth: Eating God brings food fortune and enjoyment. Wealth is generally stable; earn through talent.
shishen_shishen_relationship: Emotionally rich, good at expressing love; sweet married life.
shishen_shishen_health: Eating God brings enjoyment; watch out for overindulgence leading to weight gain.
shishen_shishen_advice: Showcase your talents and enjoy life, but don't become too complacent.
shishen_shangguan_career: Suitable for creative, design, performing arts, writing, consulting, and other fields requiring innovation and eloquence.
shishen_shangguan_wealth: Strong ability to generate wealth, but also spends lavishly. Learn to earn more and spend less.
shishen_shangguan_relationship: Picky in relationships; prone to arguments with partner.
shishen_shangguan_health: Hurting Officer brings consumption; avoid overusing your brain and voice.
shishen_shangguan_advice: Channel innovation and eloquence into the right path; don't be too flashy.
shishen_zhengcai_career: Suitable for accounting, banking, administration, finance, and other stable, practical industries.
shishen_zhengcai_wealth: Direct Wealth brings stable income; wealth is steady but won't bring sudden riches. Suited for long-term investment and savings.
shishen_zhengcai_relationship: Direct Wealth represents true love; stable and happy marriage. For males, Direct Wealth is the wife star.
shishen_zhengcai_health: Lives a regular life; generally good health.
shishen_zhengcai_advice: Maintain a diligent and practical attitude; steadily accumulate wealth.
shishen_piancai_career: Suitable for investment, trade, sales, public relations, entertainment, and other fields requiring social skills and judgment.
shishen_piancai_wealth: Indirect Wealth brings windfall gains; wealth fluctuates greatly. Good for investment and speculation, but watch the risks.
shishen_piancai_relationship: Popular with the opposite sex but may be unfaithful. Stay committed.
shishen_piancai_health: Indirect Wealth brings enjoyment; avoid excessive indulgence.
shishen_piancai_advice: Use your investment acumen wisely but control risk. Stay faithful in relationships.
shishen_zhengguan_career: Suitable for civil service, management, law, education, and other fields requiring authority and responsibility.
shishen_zhengguan_wealth: Direct Officer brings status and power; wealth is generally stable, earned through legitimate means.
shishen_zhengguan_relationship: Direct Officer represents true love; stable relationship. For females, Direct Officer is the husband star.
shishen_zhengguan_health: Lives a regular life; avoid overworking.
shishen_zhengguan_advice: Show leadership ability but stay flexible; don't be too rigid.
shishen_qisha_career: Suitable for military, law, sports, management, and other fields requiring boldness and decisiveness.
shishen_qisha_wealth: Seven Killings brings competition and pressure; wealth fluctuates greatly. Hard work required to gain wealth.
shishen_qisha_relationship: Tends to be dominant in relationships; may conflict with partner.
shishen_qisha_health: Seven Killings brings pressure and accidents; pay attention to safety and mental health.
shishen_qisha_advice: Turn pressure into motivation, but watch your temper and stay safe.
shishen_zhengyin_career: Suitable for education, culture, religion, charity, counseling, and other fields requiring compassion and cultivation.
shishen_zhengyin_wealth: Direct Resource brings noble help and education; wealth is generally stable, earned through knowledge and benefactors.
shishen_zhengyin_relationship: Gentle in relationships; stable marriage. Tolerant toward partner.
shishen_zhengyin_advice: Keep learning and improving; make good use of benefactor luck; show compassion and tolerance.
shishen_pianyin_career: Suitable for research, divination, traditional medicine, counseling, art creation, and other fields requiring unique thinking.
shishen_pianyin_wealth: Indirect Resource brings unconventional income; wealth is unstable. Earn through unique skills.
shishen_pianyin_relationship: Passive in relationships; prone to loneliness.
shishen_pianyin_health: Indirect Resource brings solitude; pay attention to mental health and socialize more.
shishen_pianyin_advice: Leverage your unique thinking, but integrate into society; don't isolate yourself.

dayun_tone_1: This decade is like polishing: not necessarily dramatic, but it strengthens your foundation.
dayun_tone_2: This decade is like harvest: what you planted earlier will bear results during this period.

dayun_theme_strong: This luck cycle amplifies your strongest element; opportunities concentrate, but overexertion is a risk.

dayun_tpl_help_0: This luck pillar has strong noble person luck. Take initiative, meet new circles, start new projects. Once you take the step, opportunities will come to you.
dayun_tpl_help_1: Overall momentum is upward. Resources and connections are drawn to you. Good for changing tracks, further education, or moving to a bigger platform.
dayun_tpl_help_2: Good time to use what you've accumulated. Leverage noble persons and platforms to pursue titles, certifications, or promotions.
dayun_tpl_self_0: Self-awareness strengthens during this period. You'll want to live on your own terms. Good for establishing personal style, IP, or career direction, but don't burn all bridges.
dayun_tpl_self_1: You may feel an impulse to 'try just once.' Good for starting businesses, side projects, or changing majors, but always keep a safety cushion.
dayun_tpl_self_2: You may form your own value system, creating some tension with family or environment. Learn to balance persistence and compromise.
dayun_tpl_attack_0: This is a highly competitive luck pillar. You may face exams, promotions, performance targets, or workplace politics. Good for pushing forward, but use strategy rather than brute force.
dayun_tpl_attack_1: External environment will force you to grow. Possible job changes, city moves, or circle changes. Use this time to develop negotiation skills and boundaries.
dayun_tpl_attack_2: Good time to actively pursue positions, especially in management, frontline business, or performance-oriented roles.
dayun_tpl_drain_0: This period is more like a 'charging phase.' Effort may exceed immediate returns. Good for studying, practicing, building portfolios—invest in things that accumulate value.
dayun_tpl_drain_1: Life pace may feel hectic, easy to multitask. Learn to prioritize; trying to handle everything will drain you physically and mentally.
dayun_tpl_drain_2: Good for quietly building foundations: reading, certifications, skills, fitness. Short-term results may not show, but will manifest in the next 1-2 luck pillars.
dayun_tpl_stress_0: Responsibility will be forcefully increased. You may need to care for family, bear financial pressure, or face long-term work stress. Stay steady, don't gamble recklessly.
dayun_tpl_stress_1: This period may feel dragged by reality. When inner pressure builds, exercise regularly, talk to someone, avoid letting emotions accumulate into physical problems.
dayun_tpl_stress_2: Rules and systems become more prominent. Learn to play within the system—understand processes, reporting, and how to protect yourself.
dayun_tpl_neutral_0: Overall relatively stable without extreme ups and downs. Good for gradually organizing life structure: money, relationships, time, health—all get fine-tuned.
dayun_tpl_neutral_1: You can set a more comfortable pace, leave room for hobbies, and see if new possibilities emerge.
dayun_tpl_neutral_2: Good for long-term but not urgent things: learning a new language, skill, or instrument, or developing habits that truly benefit you.
dayun_event_hint_childhood: Mostly corresponds to family environment, parents' work changes, moving, school transitions—greatly affects your growth atmosphere.
dayun_event_hint_student: Mainly reflects in academics, peer circles, interpersonal relationships, and early romantic experiences.
dayun_event_hint_early_career: Mostly related to job hunting, internships, entering society, first job change, or independent living.
dayun_event_hint_career_dev: Career direction adjustments, income structure changes, and key choices about settling down are common.
dayun_event_hint_midlife: Common themes include family responsibilities, property, children's education, and career repositioning.
dayun_event_hint_mature: More reflected in health, quality of life, family atmosphere, and inner state adjustments.
liunian_tpl_help_0: Strong interpersonal support. Noble persons, teachers, bosses, or clients are helpful. Good for proposing your ideas.
liunian_tpl_help_1: Good for starting new plans: changing majors, teams, jobs, moving, studying abroad—you'll easily find people willing to help.
liunian_tpl_help_2: Overall atmosphere is smooth. Things that were stuck may suddenly have breakthroughs. Try more.
liunian_tpl_self_0: Strong self-will this year. You'll especially care about 'what I truly want.' Good for making life direction decisions.
liunian_tpl_self_1: You prefer your own pace and don't like being arranged. Be gentler in communication with family and colleagues.
liunian_tpl_self_2: Personal expression may surge: wanting to create content, speak up, change image. A good year to reshape your personal brand.
liunian_tpl_attack_0: Competition and confrontation feel heavy. May encounter exams, promotions, performance pressure, or relationship conflicts.
liunian_tpl_attack_1: Use strategy over emotion. Good for improving negotiation, expression, and boundary-setting. Learn to say 'no.'
liunian_tpl_attack_2: A good year to fight for what you want, and also to recognize what's not worth continuing. Making reductions is important.
liunian_tpl_drain_0: Busy and rushed, many things to do, time feels insufficient. Focus energy on the 2-3 most important things.
liunian_tpl_drain_1: Study, certifications, projects, family care—draining tasks are numerous. Don't over-schedule yourself.
liunian_tpl_drain_2: Good for quietly honing skills or works. Tiring in the short term, but crucial for the next 1-2 years.
liunian_tpl_stress_0: Responsibility and pressure feel heavy. Reality pushes you along: money, health, family, contracts all need attention.
liunian_tpl_stress_1: If your body starts sending signals (insomnia, anxiety, binge eating), take it seriously. Seek professional help if needed.
liunian_tpl_stress_2: High external demands this year. Good for solidifying foundations and controlling risk. Not ideal for big gambling decisions.
liunian_tpl_neutral_0: Overall stable, life proceeds step by step. Good for repairing relationships, tidying up, and giving yourself breathing room.
liunian_tpl_neutral_1: Can be used to try new interests, develop side project prototypes. Less rigid assessment, making it easier to experiment with new directions.
liunian_tpl_neutral_2: Good for annual review: see which habits are worth keeping, which people and things can slowly be let go.
